mapper.sql: pet.employee_id as pe_id, pet.height, pet.weight, pet.marital_status, pet.household_character, pet.address, pet.zipcode, pet.household_address, pet.household_zipcode, pet.collective_household_flag, pet.collective_address, pet.native_place, pet.instructions_flag, pet.check_flag, pet.remarks, pet.attribute1, pet.attribute2, pet.attribute3, pet.attribute4, pet.attribute5, pet.enabled_flag, pet.id, pet.update_time, pet.update_by, pet.create_time, pet.create_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.height as ${tAlias}_height, ${tAlias}.weight as ${tAlias}_weight, ${tAlias}.marital_status as ${tAlias}_marital_status, ${tAlias}.household_character as ${tAlias}_household_character, ${tAlias}.address as ${tAlias}_address, ${tAlias}.zipcode as ${tAlias}_zipcode, ${tAlias}.household_address as ${tAlias}_household_address, ${tAlias}.household_zipcode as ${tAlias}_household_zipcode, ${tAlias}.collective_household_flag as ${tAlias}_collective_household_flag, ${tAlias}.collective_address as ${tAlias}_collective_address, ${tAlias}.native_place as ${tAlias}_native_place, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_temp (employee_id, height, weight, marital_status, household_character, address, zipcode, household_address, household_zipcode, collective_household_flag, collective_address, native_place, instructions_flag, check_flag, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, enabled_flag, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{householdCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{householdAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{householdZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{collectiveHouseholdFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{collectiveAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_temp set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, height = #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, marital_status = #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_character = #{householdCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zipcode = #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_address = #{householdAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_zipcode = #{householdZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, collective_household_flag = #{collectiveHouseholdFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, collective_address = #{collectiveAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, native_place = #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
